description: You are a Facilities Manager preparing the FZK-Haus model for COBie handover to the building owner. The model is pre-loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Read the COBie handover specification from /home/ga/Desktop/cobie_spec.txt and enrich all assets: (1) Add Pset_ManufacturerTypeInformation to ALL IfcWindow elements with properties: Manufacturer ('Schuco International KG'), ModelLabel ('FW 60+'), ProductionYear ('2019'), GlobalTradeItemNumber ('4012236013245'), (2) Add Pset_ManufacturerTypeInformation to ALL IfcDoor elements with properties: Manufacturer ('Hormann KG'), ModelLabel ('THP Universal'), ProductionYear ('2021'), GlobalTradeItemNumber ('4034598167823'), (3) Add Pset_WindowCommon to ALL IfcWindow elements with properties: IsExternal (True), ThermalTransmittance (1.1), GlazingAreaFraction (0.7), (4) Create an IfcGroup named 'Glazing Package' and assign ALL IfcWindow elements to it using IfcRelAssignsToGroup. Save the enriched model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_cobie.ifc.
